title: Sendbird User
description: A user registered in the Sendbird application.

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user within the Sendbird application.

nickname.description: Display nickname of the user shown in chat.

profile_url.description: URL of the user's profile image.

is_online.description: Whether the user is currently online.

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active (not deactivated).

last_seen_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) of the user's last activity.

access_token.description: Session token for the user. Returned when issue_access_token is true during creation.

metadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs associated with the user.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the user was created.
